# shapeindices

The goal of shapeindices is to create indices for sf polygons that
describe its shape. It does so by triangulating the polygon as well as
creating some bounding or reference shapes. It explicitly accounts for
holes and multi-polygons. Only indices that are (0,1\] are considered.

## Installation

You can install the development version of shapeindices

``` r

devtools::install_github(nkaza/shapeindices)
```

## Example

Here is a basic example of usage.

``` r

library(shapeindices)

square <- sf::st_sfc(sf::st_polygon(list(rbind(c(0,0), c(10,0), c(10,10), c(0,10), c(0,0)))), crs = "+proj=cartesian")
moment_of_inertia_index(square)

#> $index
#> [1] 0.9549297
#> 
#> $J
#> [1] 1666.667
#> 
#> $Ixx
#> [1] 833.3333
#> 
#> $Iyy
#> [1] 833.3333
#> 
#> $Ixy
#> [1] 2.220446e-14
#> 
#> $J_ref
#> [1] 1591.549
#> 
#> $area
#> [1] 100
#> 
#> $total_weight
#> [1] 100
#> 
#> $centroid
#> Geometry set for 1 feature 
#> Geometry type: POINT
#> Dimension:     XY
#> Bounding box:  xmin: 5 ymin: 5 xmax: 5 ymax: 5
#> CRS:           NA
#> POINT (5 5)
#> 
#> $triangles
#> Simple feature collection with 2 features and 2 fields
#> Geometry type: POLYGON
#> Dimension:     XY
#> Bounding box:  xmin: 0 ymin: 0 xmax: 10 ymax: 10
#> CRS:           NA
#>   tri_id area                       geometry
#> 1      1   50 POLYGON ((0 10, 0 0, 10 0, ...
#> 2      2   50 POLYGON ((10 0, 10 10, 0 10...
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`cdt_triangles()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/cdt_triangles.md)
  : Constrained Delaunay triangulation of a (multi)polygon
- [`convex_decompose()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/convex_decompose.md)
  : Convex decomposition of a (multi)polygon (Hertel-Mehlhorn).
- [`convexity_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/convexity_index.md)
  : Convexity/dispersal index of a (multi)polygon
- [`convexity_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/convexity_index_sf.md)
  : convexity_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`depth_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/depth_index.md)
  : Depth index: mean distance to the boundary vs an equal-area circle
- [`depth_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/depth_index_sf.md)
  : depth_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`detour_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/detour_index.md)
  : Detour compactness score of a (multi)polygon
- [`detour_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/detour_index_sf.md)
  : detour_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`directional_balance_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/directional_balance_index.md)
  : Directional balance index of a (multi)polygon's mass distribution
- [`directional_balance_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/directional_balance_index_sf.md)
  : directional_balance_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`exchange_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/exchange_index.md)
  : Exchange compactness score of a (multi)polygon
- [`exchange_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/exchange_index_sf.md)
  : exchange_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`hull_ratio_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/hull_ratio_index.md)
  : Convex hull area ratio of a (multi)polygon
- [`hull_ratio_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/hull_ratio_index_sf.md)
  : hull_ratio_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`moment_isotropy_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/moment_isotropy_index.md)
  : Moment isotropy index of a (multi)polygon's mass distribution
- [`moment_isotropy_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/moment_isotropy_index_sf.md)
  : Vectorised wrapper for an sf data frame - each row indexed
  independently.
- [`moment_of_inertia_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/moment_of_inertia_index.md)
  : Polar moment-of-inertia compactness/dispersal index of a
  (multi)polygon.
- [`moment_of_inertia_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/moment_of_inertia_index_sf.md)
  : Vectorised wrapper for an sf data frame - each row indexed
  independently.
- [`polsby_popper_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/polsby_popper_index.md)
  : Polsby-Popper compactness score of a (multi)polygon
- [`polsby_popper_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/polsby_popper_index_sf.md)
  : polsby_popper_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`prepare_polygon()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/prepare_polygon.md)
  : Validate and triangulate a polygon once
- [`radial_concentration_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/radial_concentration_index.md)
  : Radial concentration index: mean distance to the geometric median vs
  an equal-area circle
- [`radial_concentration_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/radial_concentration_index_sf.md)
  : radial_concentration_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`reock_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/reock_index.md)
  : Reock compactness score of a (multi)polygon
- [`reock_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/reock_index_sf.md)
  : reock_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`shape_indices()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/shape_indices.md)
  : All indices (or a chosen subset) for a single (multi)polygon
- [`shape_indices_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/shape_indices_sf.md)
  : All indices (or a chosen subset) for every feature in an sf data
  frame.
- [`span_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/span_index.md)
  : Span index: mean pairwise interior distance vs. an equal-area circle
- [`span_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/span_index_sf.md)
  : span_index() for every row of an sf data frame
- [`subdivide_mesh()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/subdivide_mesh.md)
  : Adaptive subdivision of a CDT mesh into a finer triangle mesh.
- [`tri_quad_points()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/tri_quad_points.md)
  : 3-point interior (Hammer-Stroud) quadrature rule for a triangle
- [`width_length_ratio_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/width_length_ratio_index.md)
  : Width-length ratio of a (multi)polygon's minimum-area bounding
  rectangle
- [`width_length_ratio_index_sf()`](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/reference/width_length_ratio_index_sf.md)
  : width_length_ratio_index() for every row of an sf data frame

# Articles

### Articles

- [1. Basic
  Usage](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/a-basic-usage.md):
- [2. Discretising
  Shapes](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/b-understanding-triangulation.md):
- [3. Understanding Convexity
  Index](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/c-understanding-convexity-index.md):
- [4. Understanding Moment of Inertia
  Index](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/d-understanding-moment-of-inertia-index.md):
- [5. Understanding Span
  Index](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/e-understanding-span-index.md):
- [6. Understanding Radial Concentration
  Index](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/f-understanding-radial-concentration-index.md):
- [7. Understanding Moment Isotropy
  Index](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/g-understanding-moment-isotropy-index.md):
- [8. Understanding Directional Balance
  Index](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/h-understanding-directional-balance-index.md):
- [9. Understanding Depth
  Index](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/i-understanding-depth-index.md):
- [10. Understanding the Classical Compactness
  Metrics](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/j-understanding-classical-indices.md):
- [11. Comparing Shape Indices: North Carolina
  Counties](https://nkaza.github.io/shapeindices/articles/k-nc-counties-comparison.md):
